title: Request Lines, Methods, Target Forms, Versions, and Routing Inputs · Guided Systems Studio
summary: A protocol pairing room predicts byte, parser, state, ownership, and cleanup transitions before assembling the first strict request-line and request-target parser for request lines, methods, target forms, versions, and routing inputs. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of strict request-line and request-target parser while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Parse method, one-space delimiters, request target, HTTP version, and CRLF without accepting ambiguous extra components.
Recognize any valid method token, preserve case, then apply supported-method policy separately.
Distinguish origin-form, absolute-form, authority-form, and asterisk-form using method and recipient role.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Workshop Request Line Delimiters
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop protocol team handles case 7286 in a field-normalizing cache with an independent origin parser. Build deterministic Go evidence to select the request-target form without normalizing away the raw routing boundary; preserve this operating constraint: all attacker-controlled counts must be validated before allocation or slicing; then replace one field with repeated non-combinable lines and preserve their order. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Workshop Request Line Delimiters.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for parse method, one-space delimiters, request target, http version, and crlf without accepting ambiguous extra components. For Commit to the mission model · Workshop Request Line Delimiters, keep Request Line Delimiters connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
